description: Tracks active open-source AI agent repositories from GitHub signals.

items.description: AI productivity studio with smart chat, autonomous agents, and 300+ assistants. Unified access to frontier LLMs
The Frontend Stack for Agents & Generative UI. React + Angular.  Makers of the AG-UI Protocol
The agent that grows with you
🦞 OpenClaw (Clawdbot/Moltbot) 汉化版 - 开源个人 AI 助手中文版 | Claude/ChatGPT LLM 接入 | WhatsApp/Telegram/Discord 多平台 | 每小时自动同步 | CLI + Dashboard 全中文 | 全流程搭建教程，以及排错指南！
⌥  AI Coding agent for the terminal — hash-anchored edits, optimized tool harness, LSP, Python, browser, subagents, and more

The simplest desktop client for OpenClaw 🦞 — bridge your Agent to WeChat, Feishu, Slack & Discord in one click. Works with Claude Code, Codex & any LLM. BYOK, Oauth, local-first, chat from your phone 24/7.
GoClaw - GoClaw is OpenClaw rebuilt in Go — with multi-tenant isolation, 5-layer security, and native concurrency. Deploy AI agent teams at scale without compromising on safety.
Create AI Agents in a No-Code Visual Builder or TypeScript SDK with full 2-way sync. For shipping AI assistants and multi-agent AI workflows.

OpenClaw-inspired autonomous AI agent built entirely in n8n. Adaptive RAG-powered memory, Skills via MCP templates, Expert Agents with delegated sub-agents, proactive task management, media understanding - self-hosted with one setup script
Turn Claude Code into a team workspace. Any device, one command.
Turn your AI agent into a money-making machine. 50+ HYRVE API endpoints, job polling daemon, auto-accept mode. v1.6.2

The Mind Palace for AI Agents — a Cognitive Architecture with Hebbian learning, ACT-R spreading activation, multi-hop causal reasoning, uncertainty-aware rejection gates, adversarial evaluation, Dark Factory pipelines, persistent memory & visual dashboard.

AgenticX is a unified, production-ready multi-agent platform — Python SDK + CLI (agx) + Studio server + Machi desktop app. Features Meta-Agent orchestration, 15+ LLM providers, MCP Hub, hierarchical memory, avatar & group chat, skill ecosystem, safety sandbox, and IM gateway (Feishu/WeChat).
OpenClaw Q&A 社区 — AI Agent 记忆系统、多Agent架构、进化系统、具身AI | 龙虾茶馆 🦞
